Dream Scenario (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $5,742,193Details
International Box Office $6,760,615
Worldwide Box Office $12,502,808
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $252,614
Total $252,614
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Hapless family man Paul Matthews finds his life turned upside down when millions of strangers suddenly start seeing him in their dreams. But when his nighttime appearances take a nightmarish turn, Paul is forced to navigate his newfound stardom.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$220,035 (3.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.40 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:45.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:6 opening theaters/1,578 max. theaters, 2.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $6,274,767

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 10th, 2023 (Limited) by A24
International Releases: November 10th, 2023 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
November 16th, 2023 (Limited) (Italy)
December 15th, 2023 (Limited) (South Africa)
December 26th, 2023 (Limited) (Poland)
December 27th, 2023 (Limited) (France)
Video Release: December 22nd, 2023 by A24
MPA Rating: R for language, violence and some sexual content.
(Rating bulletin 2802 (cert #54336), 9/27/2023)
Running Time: 101 minutes
Film festival: Toronto International Film Festival 2023
Plot point: Dream Sequence, Internet, Media Circus, Viral Video
Social setting: Surrealism / Absurdism
Subgenre: Black Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: A24, Square Peg
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
